hero.headline: Water Damage Emergency? We're On-Site in 60 Minutes — Guaranteed
hero.subheadline: Phoenix's certified restoration experts handle insurance claims directly, saving you thousands while restoring your home to better-than-before condition.

services_section.label: EMERGENCY SERVICES
services_section.heading: Complete Water Damage Solutions
services_section.subheading: From initial assessment to final restoration, we handle every step with precision and care

services.title: Emergency Water Extraction
services.description: 24/7 rapid response with industrial-grade pumps and dehumidifiers. We arrive within 60 minutes to prevent further damage and begin immediate water removal.

services.title: Mold Remediation & Testing
services.description: EPA-certified mold removal with air quality testing before and after treatment. Complete containment protocols protect your family's health throughout the process.

services.title: Structural Drying & Restoration
services.description: Advanced moisture detection technology ensures complete drying of walls, floors, and hidden areas. Full reconstruction services return your home to pre-loss condition.

services.title: Insurance Claims Management
services.description: We work directly with your insurance company, handling all paperwork and negotiations. Our expertise maximizes your settlement while minimizing your out-of-pocket costs.

about.heading: Phoenix's Most Trusted Water Damage Specialists
about.body: For over 15 years, Phoenix Home Restoration has been Arizona's go-to emergency response team. Our IICRC-certified technicians combine cutting-edge equipment with old-fashioned customer service, ensuring every Phoenix-area family gets their life back on track quickly and affordably.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Pipe burst at 2 AM and they were here by 3:15. The crew worked through the night and had everything dried out in 3 days. Insurance covered everything thanks to their documentation. Incredible service when we needed it most.

reviews.name: David R.
reviews.text: Discovered mold behind our kitchen wall during renovation. Phoenix Home came out same day, contained the area, and completed removal in 48 hours. Air quality test came back clean and they rebuilt the wall perfectly.

reviews.name: Jennifer K.
reviews.text: Water heater flooded our entire first floor. They handled everything - extraction, drying, repairs, even dealing with our insurance company. We didn't pay a dime out of pocket. Highly recommend for any water emergency.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving the Greater Phoenix Metropolitan Area
service_areas.subheading: Emergency response available 24/7 throughout Maricopa County

cta.heading: Don't Wait — Water Damage Gets Worse Every Hour
cta.body: Our certified emergency response team is standing by 24/7. Call now for immediate assistance or request a free damage assessment.
